name: event-card-01
title: Event Card 01
author: ilinxa
description: Event preview card with a 6-state status state machine (open / upcoming / lastSpots / ongoing / full / expired) and 4 visual variants (grid / feed / list / compact). Polymorphic root, soft-failure item shape, overlay-link pattern, fully customizable. Public helper kernel exports for status / formatting reuse outside the card.
